productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men SL 72 Navy Blue Casual Shoes
description: One of adidas' historic shoes, the SL 72 of the adidas originals collection made its debut with the 1972 Munic Olympics. Remaining quite the same since then, this iconic shoe comes with a fabulous running silhouette, artfully combining function and fashion. UpperNylon and suede upper with contrast-coloured adidas patented 3-Stripes on the midfoot sidesLacing system for a snug, customised FitSynthetic leather tongue with perforations for breathable comfortLightly padded collar for optimum fitMesh inner lining with a cushioned footbed for all-day comfortMidsoleMoulded PU midsole detailing for vintage style and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with terraced grooves and circular lugs for absolute durability, grip and tractionShoe careClean the upper using a suede brush and dry, clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
